testQuery.name: Identify
testQuery.test: Operation must be compliant with OAI-PMH standard
Error tag found but not expected : badVerb

testQuery.test: Operation must be compliant with OAI-PMH standard
Error tag expected but not found : badArgument

Error tag expected but not found : badArgument
